underlying_goal: Configure development environment tools (Ghostty terminal, Obsidian Claudian plugin) and learn Claude Code usage tips
friction_detail: User reported Cmd+Shift+T shortcut not working, zshrc alias conflict with git plugin, and Claudian plugin not appearing in Obsidian initially.
brief_summary: User wanted to configure Ghostty terminal and Obsidian Claudian plugin; both were successfully installed with minor troubleshooting for zsh alias conflicts and plugin visibility.
